prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DOY-BLACKPANESSENTIALGEMS-KIT Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Finishing Gold Prospecting Equipment Kit with Glass Vials Gold Pan Magnifying Tweezers, 14pc Description: The ASR Outdoor compact gold prospecting bundle comes with 14 essential tools for identifying, collecting, and evaluating gold flakes and precious metals while panning for valuable materials - glass collection vials, a gold sifting pan, and a 4x magnifying glass tweezer.

This gold panning kit comes with a 10" diameter black gold pan with a single riffle designed to sift through dirt and silt for gold nuggets and flakes. The deep black color will ensure your ability to locate and sift through silt and sand for valuable materials.

The ASR Outdoor gold rush set features 12 glass collection vials, 6 of each size: 2 dram and 3/4 dram (.04 oz and .125 oz). The small and large-sized vials are ideal for storing gems, gold flakes, and other precious metals located during gold prospecting. Each vial comes with an air-tight plastic lid to keep your valuable findings stored during transit out of the field.

Lastly, we've Included a 4X magnification tweezer designed to assist with picking up and evaluating valuable flakes and nuggets. The 4X magnification power allows you to inspect what you've located and evaluate whether it's worth further inspection.

Gold panning is a great outdoor activity for adults and children alike. This compact kit easily fits inside most standard backpacks and travel bags, making it a great bundle for camping and hiking adventures. Take this set with you next time you go out to prospect, and maybe you'll strike it rich. Search Terms: gold prospecting rush equipment supplies rockhounding equipment for adults kids gold rush nuggets gold panning kit equipment pans pay dirt rocks and gems tools and supplies camping essentials supplies accessories gold sluice box matting tools Features: - ESSENTIAL GOLD PROSPECTING TOOLS - ASR Outdoor gold panning kit comes with 14 essential tools for locating, collecting, and evaluating gems and minerals while panning for gold - a gold pan, glass collection vials, and a magnifying tweezer. - 10" DIAMETER GOLD PAN - Kit comes with a 10" diameter single riffle black gold pan designed to sift through silt and dirt for gold flakes. The dark black color ensures you'll be able to identify and separate precious metals from sand and dirt. - GLASS COLLECTION VIALS - Set features 12 collection vials, 6 of each size: 3/4 dram and 2 dram. The large and small sizes are great for storing gold flakes, gems, and other valuable finds during gold prospecting. Each vial comes with an air-tight plastic lid to keep your findings safe during transit. - 4X MAGNIFYING TWEEZER - Included is a 4X magnification tweezer designed to easily pick up small gems and flakes for further evaluation. The 4X magnification power will allow you to evaluate your findings and identify whether they are worth further inspection. - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: ABS plastic, glass, stainless steel; Colors: black, silver; Number of pieces: 14; Dimensions of gold pan: 10" diameter: Tweezer magnification: 4X; Glass vial sizes: 3/4 dram and 2 dram (.05 oz and .125 oz); Officially licensed ASR Outdoor gold panning equipment === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 14pc Gold Prospecting Kit Black Gold Pan

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 14-Piece Black Gold Prospecting Kit
